title: Silicon spectrum
description: Spectrum of silicon taken with a diffraction grating and a cellphone camera, from a 12V circuit. Unfortunately it was not possible to remove sodium contamination from the surface of the sample.
author: Umop503
attribution_md:
Silicon spectrum
Spectrum of silicon taken with a diffraction grating and a cellphone camera, from a 12V circuit. Unfortunately it was not possible to remove sodium contamination from the surface of the sample.
